content:
🌟 nanochat | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an accessible and cost-effective platform for researchers and developers to train, experiment with, and deploy Large Language Models, particularly focusing on achieving GPT-2 level capabilities on minimal hardware.
✨ Key Features: • Minimalist and hackable codebase for LLM training • Supports full LLM lifecycle: tokenization, pretraining, finetuning, evaluation, inference • Includes a ChatGPT-like web UI for interaction
📖 Summary: nanochat is a minimalist and hackable Python framework for training and experimenting with Large Language Models (LLMs) on a single GPU. It covers the full LLM lifecycle from tokenization to inference and includes a ChatGPT-like UI, enabling users to train models like GPT-2 for a fraction of the original cost.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
